subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-25 in London
subcodes.first_line: Yesterday, the editor-in-chief of the Christian Commonwealth requested that I write something for publication in his newspaper
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیروز نظر بخواهش مدیر جریدهٴ کرسچن کامن ولت من برای آن روزنامه چیزی نوشتم که بسبب منازعهٴ
subcodes.subjects: @Satan; the Evil One, @contention and conflict, @Adam; Adam and Eve
